one_liner: I care about good engineering more than anything, and I push everyone around me to care too — across 4 years of building with React, Vue, and Laravel

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Designed Nuxt.js frontend architecture (composables, shared UI patterns, API abstractions) for a 6-month page-by-page migration from a legacy Vue codebase
Shipped Laravel backend work on deadline with zero review revisions — 2 feature refactors, plenty of bug fixes, and feature ports across their fragmented multi-repo setup

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Migrated Telegram bot from JavaScript to TypeScript with Playwright coverage, eliminating most type-error crashes — dropping production bug reports from 2–3 per week to about 1 every 2 weeks
Built 15+ Svelte/SvelteKit components for a full system revamp — including the data-mesh/table component used across the new product's admin views

experience.title: Junior PHP Developer
bullets: Built and maintained 6 shipping and marketplace integrations (J&T, NinjaVan, ParcelHub, Shopee, Lazada, Zalora) powering daily order operations for 20+ B2B SaaS clients
Built a real-time Facebook Live sales dashboard — webhooks ingested order events, WebSockets pushed live revenue and order counts during broadcasts

main.name: Bigcampus
bullets: Social platform for meeting people through clubs and gatherings — full-stack Laravel + Next.js
Engineered the gathering lifecycle as a state machine (Open > Lock-in > Room > Completed) with auto-cancellation, conflict windows, and real-time WebSocket coordination
Deployed as a containerized PWA with service-worker push notifications — Laravel, Reverb, and scheduler in a single Docker image

others.name: Atuk Opah
